issues.title: Enemy dealt 8 damage (73% of 11 HP) on floor 2
issues.description: At turn seq 91, floor 2 encounter 2, enemy dealt 8 damage when player had 11 HP. This is 73% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 8 damage (73% of player's 11 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 2
issues.description: average profile was defeated on floor 2 with 69.23076923076923% accuracy. Final encounter against shade_stalker (mini_boss), dealt 20 but took 33 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing early floor difficulty or adding more healing opportunities

issues.title: Max combo stuck at 3 despite 69% accuracy — likely systemic combo cap bug
issues.description: Max combo across entire run is exactly 3 (65 cards played, 69.2% accuracy). All 6 encounters also capped at maxCombo <= 3. With this accuracy, higher combos should be achievable. This appears to be a systemic bug in the combo counting logic.

evidence.metric: maxCombo = 3 with 69.2% accuracy — systemic cap suspected

reproductionSteps: Achieve consecutive correct answers and observe combo counter
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter logic — appears to be capped at 3 instead of scaling to 5
